reviews.text: Caley was incredible to work with for our wedding! She is so sweet, and our flowers were absolutely beautiful. We received so many compliments from our guests throughout the day! She also handled the venue setup and breakdown seamlessly, which made everything so much less stressful for us. We highly recommend Fanciful!

Caley made our dream wedding a reality and made our vision come to life! She had a great attention to detail. Everything was more perfect than we could have imagined! She was super knowledgeable and helpful. She recommended amazing vendors to work with when we needed ideas. Caley also thought outside the box and prepared us for everything- even stuff we would have never thought of! She was very prepared, reliable, and great at communication. I especially appreciated her organizing all of our vendors for us and creating timelines for all of them! Plus she knew all our vendor contracts/rules inside & out! It was a stress free wedding planning experience thanks to Caley! She also made the best bridal bouquet & groom boutonniere! The flowers were beautiful. Caley went above and beyond and did such an amazing job! I would recommend her to everyone! Our special day and wedding planning process would not have been the same without Caley!

Caley did the florals, decor and the planning for our wedding in Estes Park in September 2025 and everything turned out perfectly. We had multiple people tell us "this is the best wedding I've ever been to" and we owe a lot of that to Caley.

I will never get over how amazing the florals turned out! We told Caley the color scheme and vibe we were going with and she did the rest.

Caley was really helpful when planning our wedding and we didn't have to worry about anything the day of because she was on it. If you're getting married at Black Canyon Inn I would definitely recommend Fanciful! They were pros!
Caley absolutely exceeded our expectations. The flowers and drapes on the beams blew everyone away and created such a fresh, romantic atmosphere in a very rustic wedding venue. Thank you so much!!

Caley did a wonderful job with both the floral arrangements and the month-of-coordination for our Estes Park wedding. We really appreciated her checklists, vendor recommendations, and regular check-ins during the build-up to the wedding. She suggested things we hadn’t even considered. On the day of, she kept everything on track and helped herd our guests and wedding party with lots of tact and kindness. Our other vendors and family members were full of praise for Caley!

The wedding flowers were beautiful and we received lots of compliments. We had requested a few favorite flowers and colors to incorporate, but Caley was able to take our vague ideas and turn them into stunning arrangements. We would absolutely recommend working with Caley / Fanciful!
